top_stories.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
top_stories.summary: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
top_stories.why_it_matters: This belongs in the top group because its effects reach across multiple parts of the ecosystem, such as enterprises, developers, platforms, users, or regulators. It has practical consequences beyond a narrow technical audience.
